options.content: Loading…

list.definition:
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(regexp_replace(t.name, '^heart360tk_facility_view_(patients|aggregated)_', '')), '')
FROM "user" u
LEFT JOIN team_member tm ON tm.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN team t ON tm.team_id = t.id
WHERE u.id = ${__user.id}
  AND t.name LIKE 'heart360tk_facility_view_%'
  AND t.name NOT LIKE '%\_ALL' ESCAPE '\'
list.name: UserFacilitySlug
list.query:
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(regexp_replace(t.name, '^heart360tk_facility_view_(patients|aggregated)_', '')), '')
FROM "user" u
LEFT JOIN team_member tm ON tm.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN team t ON tm.team_id = t.id
WHERE u.id = ${__user.id}
  AND t.name LIKE 'heart360tk_facility_view_%'
  AND t.name NOT LIKE '%\_ALL' ESCAPE '\'

list.definition:
SELECT COALESCE((
  SELECT id::text FROM org_units
  WHERE level = 3
    AND regexp_replace(lower(trim(name)), '\s+', '_', 'g') = '${UserFacilitySlug}'
  ORDER BY id
  LIMIT 1
), '')
list.name: UserFacilityId
list.query:
SELECT COALESCE((
  SELECT id::text FROM org_units
  WHERE level = 3
    AND regexp_replace(lower(trim(name)), '\s+', '_', 'g') = '${UserFacilitySlug}'
  ORDER BY id
  LIMIT 1
), '')

list.name: UserIsGlobal

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ancestor_id::text FROM org_unit_lineage WHERE org_unit_id = NULLIF('${UserFacilityId}', '')::int AND ancestor_level = 1 LIMIT 1), '')
list.name: UserRegionId
list.query: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ancestor_id::text FROM org_unit_lineage WHERE org_unit_id = NULLIF('${UserFacilityId}', '')::int AND ancestor_level = 1 LIMIT 1), '')
